text.title: Visibility of System Status Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable input signals to a conclusion that references a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Do ALL Applies-If conditions hold AND NO Skip-If condition triggers?

branch.question: Is Playwright OR session-recording tooling available?

conclusion.verdict: apply: produce status-audit with measured latency + three-state coverage + aria-live judgement.
partial-apply: static state-coverage audit only; mark latency rows as 'unmeasured' and require tooling before sign-off.
block: an action inventory is mandatory for status audit.
do not apply this methodology in this context; route to the correct one or skip.

text.example: Applies-If holds, inventory reachable, Playwright available → produce audit per r1-feedback-thresholds; trigger disabled per r4-disable-during-async; aria-live per r5-aria-live-discipline.
